---
title: "Machine Learning Concepts"
output: html_document
---

```{css, echo = FALSE}
body {
  font-family: arial;
  font-size: 13pt;
  color: black;
}
```

<style> body {text-align: justify} </style>
Hi there, I'm Seunghoon, a Data Scientist at Munich Re based in New York City. My primary responsibilities include developing various pricing models by utilizing large-scale & unstructured 12 million+ quotes. I also create ETL data pipelines and EDA notebooks for actuaries. Lastly, I worked on integrating and validating external data via APIs to enhance data enrichment processes.

Before joining Munich Re, I spent 3.5 years as an R&D Data Analyst at a biochemical company in Windsor, Wisconsin, specializing in bovine genetics. In this role, I applied machine learning models and time series forecasting techniques to predict Y-skew measurements and sperm motility, driving data-driven improvements in reproductive biotechnology."
